correct_answer: Higher Risk Residential Buildings / HMOs / Student accommodation / Care homes

text: For general-purpose socket circuits in modern domestic installs, which RCD type is typically selected under BS 7671 A2:2022?

options: Type A (with 6 mA DC protection) or Type B
correct_answer: Type A (with 6 mA DC protection) or Type B

options: Prove the voltage indicator on a known source, test, then re-prove
correct_answer: Prove the voltage indicator on a known source, test, then re-prove

text: Which BS 7671 chapter covers selection and erection of wiring systems and accessories?

options: Required where consequences include injury, safety service failure, or significant financial/data loss
correct_answer: Required where consequences include injury, safety service failure, or significant financial/data loss
